message:
feat(eval): Complete Phase 3 builtins - callable functions and extended builtins

Phase 3a: Builtins infrastructure
- Add VM builtins field with three-tier lookup (locals → globals → builtins)
- Add True, False, None constants to builtins dict

Phase 3b: Callable builtins
- Create PyBuiltinFunction type for callable wrappers
- Implement Call opcode in VM
- Add function call parsing in expr_parser
- Core builtins: len, abs, bool, int, float, str, type

Phase 3c: Extended builtins
- Container: range, list, tuple, dict, set
- Aggregation: min, max, sum, sorted, reversed
- Iteration: enumerate, zip
- I/O: print
- Utils: all, any, round, pow, ord, chr, hex, oct, bin, callable, repr

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,90 @@
+name: 'Run External Library Tests'
+description: 'Run tests from external Python libraries (numpy, scipy, etc.)'
+inputs:
+  library:
+    description: 'Library name (e.g., numpy, scipy, pandas)'
+    required: true
+  test_dir:
+    description: 'Test directory relative to repo root (e.g., tests/numpy)'
+    required: true
+  pip_packages:
+    description: 'Space-separated pip packages to install'
+    required: false
+    default: ''
+  fail_on_error:
+    description: 'Whether to fail CI on test failures (true/false)'
+    required: false
+    default: 'false'
+
+runs:
+  using: 'composite'
+  steps:
+    - name: Run external library tests
+      shell: bash
+      run: |
+        set +e
+
+        # Run tests and capture output
+        ./zig-out/bin/metal0 test ${{ inputs.test_dir }} 2>&1 | tee extlib_output.txt
+        TEST_EXIT=$?
+
+        set -e
+
+        # Strip ANSI codes for parsing
+        sed 's/\x1b\[[0-9;]*m//g' extlib_output.txt > extlib_output_clean.txt
+
+        # Parse test results
+        if grep -q "All.*tests passed" extlib_output_clean.txt; then
+          PASSED=$(grep -oE 'All [0-9]+ tests passed' extlib_output_clean.txt | grep -oE '[0-9]+' | head -1)
+          PASSED=${PASSED:-0}
+          FAILED=0
+          TOTAL=$PASSED
+        elif grep -q '[0-9]\+/[0-9]\+ passed' extlib_output_clean.txt; then
+          PASSED=$(grep -oE '[0-9]+/[0-9]+ passed' extlib_output_clean.txt | head -1 | cut -d'/' -f1)
+          TOTAL=$(grep -oE '[0-9]+/[0-9]+ passed' extlib_output_clean.txt | head -1 | cut -d'/' -f2 | cut -d' ' -f1)
+          PASSED=${PASSED:-0}
+          TOTAL=${TOTAL:-0}
+          FAILED=$((TOTAL - PASSED))
+        else
+          echo "Warning: Could not parse test results"
+          PASSED=0
+          FAILED=0
+          TOTAL=0
+        fi
+
+        # Calculate pass rate
+        if [ "$TOTAL" -gt 0 ]; then
+          RATE=$(echo "scale=1; $PASSED * 100 / $TOTAL" | bc)
+        else
+          RATE="0"
+        fi
+
+        # Generate summary
+        LIB_NAME="${{ inputs.library }}"
+        LIB_UPPER=$(echo "$LIB_NAME" | tr '[:lower:]' '[:upper:]' | head -c1)$(echo "$LIB_NAME" | tail -c+2)
+
+        echo "## ExtLib $LIB_UPPER Test Results" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+        echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+        echo "| Metric | Value |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+        echo "|--------|-------|" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+        echo "| Passed | $PASSED |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+        echo "| Failed | $FAILED |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+        echo "| Total | $TOTAL |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+        echo "| Pass Rate | ${RATE}% |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+
+        # Show failed tests if any
+        if [ "$FAILED" -gt 0 ]; then
+          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "### Failed Tests" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "\`\`\`" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          grep -E "\[FAIL\]|\[TIMEOUT\]" extlib_output_clean.txt >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY || true
+          echo "\`\`\`" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+        fi
+
+        # Exit based on fail_on_error setting
+        if [ "${{ inputs.fail_on_error }}" = "true" ] && [ "$FAILED" -gt 0 ]; then
+          echo "Tests failed and fail_on_error is true"
+          exit 1
+        fi
+
+        echo "ExtLib $LIB_UPPER: $PASSED/$TOTAL passed (${RATE}%)"

@@ -365,3 +365,40 @@ jobs:
           label: "windows"
           os: "windows"
         timeout-minutes: 60
+
+  # =============================================================================
+  # External Library Tests (Official test suites from PyPI packages)
+  # Each library has its own job for clear CI summary display
+  # =============================================================================
+
+  test-extlib-numpy:
+    name: ExtLib NumPy (11 tests)
+    runs-on: ubuntu-22.04
+    timeout-minutes: 30
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          submodules: true
+      - uses: goto-bus-stop/setup-zig@v2
+        with:
+          version: ${{ env.ZIG_VERSION }}
+      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
+        with:
+          python-version: '3.12'
+      - name: Install NumPy
+        run: pip install numpy
+      - name: Build metal0
+        run: zig build
+      - uses: ./.github/actions/run-extlib-tests
+        with:
+          library: "numpy"
+          test_dir: "tests/numpy"
+          fail_on_error: "false"
+
+  # Add more external library tests below as we add support:
+  # test-extlib-scipy:
+  #   name: ExtLib SciPy
+  #   ...
+  # test-extlib-pandas:
+  #   name: ExtLib Pandas
+  #   ...

@@ -34,6 +34,14 @@ pub const OpCode = enum(u8) {
     Return, // Return top of stack
     Call, // Call builtin function
     BuildList, // Build list from N stack items
+
+    // Name lookup (for eval with scope)
+    LoadName, // Load variable: tries locals -> globals -> builtins
+    LoadGlobal, // Load from globals dict only
+    LoadLocal, // Load from locals dict only
+    StoreName, // Store to current scope (for exec())
+    StoreGlobal, // Store to globals
+    StoreLocal, // Store to locals
 };
 
 /// Bytecode instruction
